user.title: Connect to SportyHQ
user.description:
Paste your SportyHQ session cookie value (sportyhq_v10).

To find it: log in to sportyhq.com in your browser with 'Remember me' ticked, then open DevTools → Application → Cookies → www.sportyhq.com and copy the value of the cookie named **sportyhq_v10**.

init.title: Update SportyHQ Session Cookie
init.description: Paste a fresh sportyhq_v10 cookie value if your session has expired.
